storyInfo: Hoshiguma fights her way into the TV station and helps Momoka and the others. She fights Mio again, this time without holding back, and is victorious, clearing the way for tonight's most important performance.

attributes.content: The TV station's in total chaos...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Wow...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Grandma told me stories about Northern Court special forces infiltrating Mitsukue in her youth.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: I didn't think much of it at the time. Thinking about it now, though, what we're seeing is just a fraction of what could really happen...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: What do you think about my surprise for Kinbee?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: I think it might be a little too big...
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Well, we should focus on our own tasks. Moriuchi-san has already infiltrated the TV station. We need to head to the accession ceremony.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: There shouldn't be many people there at this time, but you'll need to help out if there's any resistance.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Gotcha.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: All that's left to do is act! I'll lead the way. Climb up this vent!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Follow me!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: I-I'm coming!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It... it's so high...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Don't worry, I've got a light. Hold my hand, and I'll lead you on.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Momoka tries not to look down, but she cannot keep herself from shaking.
They are moving through massive formations of steel rebar. The darkness of night hangs above, while it is bright as day underneath their feet.
TV station staff, yakuza, and ninja form a picture of chaos beneath them.
How are you doing, Kichisei?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: A-Alright.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Good.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: You don't come up to this kind of place often?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Who does? Are you a deserting ninja or something?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: No, I got used to this kind of place while hiding from ninjas.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Hiding?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: That's not important—we're here!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Hmph, we've got people down below...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Momoka, jump over this gap and follow those pipes down to the stage. You should be able to stay out of their view.
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: That far?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I, I'll try...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka clenches her fists, her eyes fixed forward, and kicks the ground hard—
The steel structure suddenly starts moving, and the platform beneath Momoka's feet begins to vibrate irregularly.
Why did it start moving all of a sudden?!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: I, I think I'm falling!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Watch your head!
attributes.name: Kichisei
Momoka
attributes.content: What's going on...?

attributes.name: Momoka
attributes.content: Whoa!
She fell?!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: We're going down too! Sarasa!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Ya—hoo!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Are you alright, Momoka?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: I'm alright! Hanging in there.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Get on the stage! I'll get the console! Start once the lights come on!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: I can't wait for Momoka's show—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: I'm afraid I can't let you do that.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mio...san?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: ...Momoka.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You've come to stop me, haven't you?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: For the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I know what you're going to say. That will ruin the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mio-san, Hoshiguma has shown up at the door of the TV station. You should go now, according to Mifune-san's instructions—
attributes.name: Surveilling Ninja

attributes.content: Hoshiguma showed up for her.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: But Mifune-san—
attributes.name: Surveilling Ninja

attributes.content: The other one watching me, I know you're there. Go and tell Mifune-san that Hoshiguma will definitely come, and I'll be waiting for her here.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Now, Momoka, Kichisei-san, and that girl hiding behind the console, whose name I do not know.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I suggest you stay put until Hoshiguma shows up.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Your grievances against Mifune-san and Kinsekikai are certainly legitimate. But this place is also home to me, and to many others.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I can't let you destroy it.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: She's bluffing! Momoka—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: The black ethereal hand suddenly appears in front of Kichisei's neck. She instinctively takes a step back and pulls the trigger.
The ethereal hand shreds the bead-shaped grenade.
The lights go out, and the stage darkens, illuminated only by a faint light in the direction of the console.
Mio walks towards the light, sword in one hand, tantou in the other.
That's right, I'm here... come on now...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: One of the spotlights suddenly turns on, shining straight into Mio's eyes. Then another, and another, and another—
Then they all turn off at the same time.
Mio's hesitation lasts only an instant. She takes a moment to collect herself, then charges at the console—
Bang!
A falling spotlight narrowly misses Mio's head. By the time she turns her gaze back to the control console, there is no longer anyone there.
While Mio is occupied with the console, Kichisei, Momoka and Sarasa begin running towards the side stage exit.
She locked the door! Let's try another—
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Click, click, click.
They hear the sounds of locks being engaged...
The lights above their head turn back on.
Mio slowly walks towards the gathered trio.
The lights are no longer under your control. Resistance is futile.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You think so?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Sarasa closes her eyes and raises her lamp-shaped staff.
Mio's pace quickens.
Suddenly, the tip of the staff emits a blinding light, and the spotlights above the stage turn off again.
Not just the spotlights. All the light that remains on the stage is trapped in the liquid bouncing at the tip of the staff—
Lights out, ice queen!
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: —and even the last glimmer of light is utterly consumed.
Sarasa?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Let... me sleep... I'm... so tired...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: (Whisper) Wh-What do we do? I can hear Mio-san's footsteps! She's coming!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Whisper) Let's try the other side of the stage. Maybe the door there's still unlocked...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Whisper) No, it's too far. She'll find us!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: (Whisper) This is where we fell, isn't it? Can we go back the way we came?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: (Whisper) The vents—
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Kichisei puts Sarasa on her back and was about to move, when they hear Mio's voice coming from center stage.
Don't bother. I can hear you.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: What do we do?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: It's all or nothing. I'll deal with her—
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Suddenly, she hears the sound of knocking behind her.
Is it locked? I guess we'll have to do this the hard way.
Get out of the way!
A massive crash, and the locked door swings open, bringing in light from beyond.
The next instant, as though answering the call of the light coming in from the door, bright orbs of light float up from Sarasa's staff and go back to where they came from—
...Sarasa?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I thought I would get to sleep for a little longer...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: There'll be no light here as long as I'm still asleep...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Sarasa yawns, and the spotlights above flicker.
Mio does not move from her position, so Sarasa begins walking towards the console.
Momoka follows hesitantly, but Mio remains in place.
Aren't you going to stop them?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No. Your blade is drawn.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: My duty is not to deal with them.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I doubt your minions have what it takes to beat Kichisei and Sarasa.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: In that case, there's nothing I can do.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: What about Mifune?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I don't care.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Our battle has nothing to do with him.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: The last TV station's back online, Detective Koretou!
attributes.name: Police Operator

attributes.content: I hear you.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: The guys assigned to the fireworks show want to know what to do. The citizens are still uneasy after that scare.
attributes.name: Police Operator

attributes.content: Any risk of a stampede or other serious accident?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Minimal. The situation's very much within expected parameters.
attributes.name: Police Operator

attributes.content: Then the show will go on. Mifune likes excitement. We'll give him excitement.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: We're getting calls from citizens asking what happened. What do you think...?
attributes.name: Police Operator

attributes.content: What do you think I think? Tell them we're investigating.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Kinseki Station is, of course, responsible for the erroneous announcement of a Northern Court invasion, and we're taking this very seriously—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Detective Koretou, you have a visitor!
attributes.name: Officer on Patrol

attributes.content: Who? Kouhei Mifune?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Detective Koretou.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: If it wasn't Mifune, I thought it would have been his Diet friend paying a personal visit.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Making insinuations will do no favors for your career. Besides, you overestimate your own importance.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Should I take that as an admission?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: I've come to warn you.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: The police must bear responsibility for the chaos that occurred on Nita Street tonight. We do not wish to see the chaos spread any further.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Bear responsibility, eh? Oh dear, I think I just peed my pants.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Watch your attitude. You still have a chance to settle this matter peacefully.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Do I? Pray enlighten me.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Cancel all events scheduled for tonight. Focus your forces on restoring order at Kinseki Station, and begin a search for those responsible.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Such as? The number one suspect is, I'm sure, Kouhei Mifune, considering that it was his station that broadcast that—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Your men are not allowed to touch him—
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Have a nice day.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: If you refuse to obey orders, you may go once you have signed this resignation.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Feel free to discuss any concerns with your supervisor.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Wow, I still have a chance to turn back?
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: It's too late for that.
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Like you said, it's too late for that—
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: The detective reaches out with his foot...
You—
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: ...He trips the visitor, takes the piece of paper with the name of the detective's supervisor on it, and tears it to pieces.
Oh my, I didn't expect you to fall like that. I thought our diet friend would have a tougher secretary.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: How... how dare you?!
attributes.name: Mysterious Visitor

attributes.content: Go tell your boss that the police are here to protect his bloody life, not his bloody money.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: If he really thinks someone's after his life, he can come personally to the station and file a report, and we'll take it into consideration.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: Now, get lost.
attributes.name: Detective Koretou

attributes.content: White sword, black gloves, white hand, black sword, white tantou, black ethereal hand—

It is a dizzying exchange of black and white. Contrary to the impression she gives, the Liberi's swordplay is overwhelmingly aggressive, with only attacks, feints and more attacks, with not the slightest attention paid to defense.
The moves of the one-horned Oni, on the other hand, are almost staggeringly basic. Dodge, parry, backstep, sidestep.
Twelve.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You just blocked twelve attacks in quick succession.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Why don't you fight back? Are you still afraid of your sword?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: If I was, it wouldn't have left its sheath to begin with.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You, on the other hand, look all polite and cultured, but your moves are pure aggression and ferocity. That's not Kinbee's style.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: My sword has nothing to do with him.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Then why do you give your life for him?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Since when have I given my life for him?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Stop fooling yourself.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma takes a deliberate look around.
Kichisei is sending explosions everywhere with her grenades, while the stage equipment has turned into a giant monster under Sarasa's control.
With Momoka doing an impressive job of not getting caught, the trio is more than holding their own.
There is only one last thing to do in their battle plan...
The only thing I'm trying to protect is the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: And Kinbee has to lead it?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The Kinsekikai needs to be a place where the dregs of society can survive, those who have nowhere else to go.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: And Tessai couldn't give you that?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You can keep parrying—
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: But you'll eventually show an opening.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Finally, you're attacking.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: All I got was the edge of your clothes.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: There is blue fire burning around you. Is that your Arts?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Blue fire?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You're right. I didn't notice.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Back to the question. What is it that Tessai couldn't give you, but Kinbee can?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Tessai could not even protect himself—
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Hoshiguma thrusts. The attack is simple, but the flames upon the sword force Mio to leap backwards.
That's not what I wanted to hear.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Your flames are burning even fiercer.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Tell me. Why couldn't Tessai give you what you wanted?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Because Tessai couldn't protect himself. Mitsukue didn't need him, nor did it need a Mio working under Tessai.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: A silent, ragged orphan who only fights tooth and nail when someone steps on her is a subject of scorn.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: An equally silent, well-dressed assistant who only draws her sword when the company's interests are compromised is the subject of admiration.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I thought you came from some noble martial family fallen on hard times.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hah.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Tessai wanted to give dregs of society like us a home, and so he's dead.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mifune knows we don't deserve a home, and so he lives on.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Is that how Mitsukue judges the Kinsekikai?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Always has.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Hoshiguma is almost completely engulfed in the azure flame.
The Liberi wonders if the flame will consume the Oni before it consumes her.
You are angry.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Were you angry like this too, twenty years ago?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Does that matter?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Mifune-san wants you to lose your reason, as you did twenty years ago. He believes it will turn you into a crazed beast, one that everyone will be eager to put down.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You know this is what he wants, and so you suppress yourself, which is why you didn't draw your sword the last time.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: ...Hmph.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Are you inviting me to give in to anger? Complete the mission your master assigned?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's not what I want, but I would have no issue with it. It would be a shame, that's all.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Why?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: A perfect opponent, who could never stand before me in perfect condition, forced to either suppress herself, or lose control entirely.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: But that's all.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Take this.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Mio once again prepares to attack.
Three hands, three swords, a posture seemingly without form or order, but ready to pounce on any weakness—
Catch!
Who's there?!
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: This is crazy heavy!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: You know how hard it was to get it out of Kinbee's room, even with all that chaos at the TV station?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: ...Catch!
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Moriuchi swings his entire body to throw Hannya in the direction of the standoff.

Mio's ethereal hand is the first to catch Hannya's handle, but Hoshiguma leaps and spins one hundred and eighty degrees like she is dancing, forcing the ethereal hand to loosen its grip, allowing her to take Hannya's handle.
Suppress, or lose control?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It won't happen. With or without Hannya.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma tightens her grip around the ribbon on her sword.
Hannya's an old friend, after all. Maybe you had a chance just now... but not any longer.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Rage.
The rage that seemed compressed around Hoshiguma now spreads outwards, burning on her arms, her shield, and her sword.
Hoshiguma takes a step forward, and the flames of rage almost catch the hem of Mio's clothing.
Good.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: It's good enough for me to know that you won't lose control.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Hoshiguma faces off against black and white, hands human and not, swords long and short.
The Liberi shows no fear. The edges of her mouth angle ever so slightly upwards.
Any last words?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Be kind to the Kinsekikai.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Be kind to Momoka.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: My conscience is clear on all other matters... except her.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I'll remember.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What about Kinbee? Any last words about him you want to say?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Him? Is there any need to talk about him, here and now?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Hah. Good point.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma shifts her posture to one that makes it easy to unleash her power. The blue flames continue to burn intermittently around her.
The face of Hannya glares with wide-open eyes on the face of the shield. The edge of the sword seems ready to seep blue blood—
Hah!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Is this... Hannya?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: Yes, this is Hannya.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Your swords are worthy of you. They took the full brunt of Hannya and survived.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You can pick them up, then we'll continue.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: There's no need.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: You've made your strength clear. There's no point in trying to fight you anymore.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: I must prepare.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: For what?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: For the aftermath.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: For a Kinsekikai without Mifune-san.
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: How's things on Momoka's side, Moriuchi? Are they ready?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Just waiting for you to finish fighting. Sarasa?
attributes.name: Moriuchi

attributes.content: Aye aye, sir! Momoka?
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Momoka stands in the middle of the stage with the spotlight on her.
Kichisei has done her best to clear a space, though there are still a few yakuza lying on the ground near her.
I... I'm ready to begin!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Alright then...
attributes.name: Sarasa

attributes.content: Kinseki Station's biggest program of the night begins now!
attributes.name: Sarasa
